overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a atmospheric harbor dock at night in a video game, likely Red Dead Redemption 2. The player moves from a covered wooden walkway along the waterfront, viewing moored boats with lanterns, then turns through an industrial storage yard with metal scaffolding and fog.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered wooden dock corridor with warehouse doors on the left

large wooden warehouse door with diagonal bracing pattern
series of warm yellow electric lamps hanging from the covered roof
old wooden wagon or cart with large spoked wheels parked on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow covered wooden dock walkway. The corridor is lined with warehouse walls and doors on the left and wooden carts on the right, illuminated by overhead electric lamps. The atmosphere is dark and enclosed with no sky visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor dock with moored sailboats

events.description: exits the covered wooden walkway into the open harbor area with visible sky and water
lighting shifts from artificial overhead lamps to mixed natural night sky and distant lantern light

agents.ego_description: walking along the open dock overlooking the harbor, observing the moored boats with lanterns

entered.detail: wooden safety railing along the edge of the dock
dark water of the harbor reflecting distant lights
multiple wooden sailboats with tall masts and lit lanterns floating in the harbor
lit buildings and structures along the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway onto an open wooden dock overlooking a night harbor. The scene reveals moored sailboats with warm lanterns floating on dark water, with distant lit buildings visible across the harbor. The sky is dark and overcast with light rain visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier extending over water with support pillars

events.description: path curves left along the waterfront, changing the perspective of the harbor view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved wooden pier with the harbor now on the right side

entered.detail: thick wooden posts supporting the dock structure and roof sections
wooden harbor buildings with lit windows along the left side

segments.scene_description: The path curves along the waterfront pier, with wooden support pillars lining the walkway. The harbor water and moored boats are now on the right, while dock buildings with warm lit windows appear on the left. The camera moves steadily forward along the weathered wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage yard with metal scaffolding and cargo

events.description: enters covered industrial area transitioning from open dock to storage yard with metal structures
atmosphere becomes foggy with industrial lighting and visible rain mist

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial harbor storage area with metal frameworks and stacked cargo

stacks of wooden shipping crates and cargo boxes
harsh industrial lighting fixtures illuminating the storage area
wooden barrels and cylindrical containers stacked near the path

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an industrial storage yard with metal scaffolding frameworks and stacked wooden crates. The atmosphere is foggy with artificial industrial lighting replacing the harbor views. The ground remains wooden decking but the environment shifts to a working cargo area with barrels and lumber stacks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic covered walkway into an open night harbor before ending in a foggy industrial yard. It begins within a narrow wooden corridor lined with warehouse walls and carts under the glow of overhead electric lamps. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens onto a rain-swept dock where moored sailboats with warm lanterns float on dark water beneath an overcast sky. The path then curves along the waterfront pier, passing weathered wooden pillars and buildings with lit windows, before turning away from the harbor. Finally, the environment shifts into a working cargo area, where the open water is replaced by dense fog, metal scaffolding, and stacks of wooden crates under artificial industrial lighting.
